items.myth: Any business problem becomes a Claude use case if you buy enough tokens.
items.reality: Claude excels at language-centric workflows. Deterministic ETL, hard real-time control, and proprietary numeric pipelines still need traditional software.
items.example: Reconciling millions of ledger rows nightly belongs in SQL/Spark; Claude might help write the query, not replace the pipeline.

items.myth: Deploying Claude in support removes the need for a knowledge base.
items.reality: Strong support use cases **ground** Claude on curated articles, tickets, or retrieval—not model memory alone.
items.example: Without uploaded return-policy text, Claude may invent refund rules.
